title: photinia parvifolia var. chingshuiensis
intro:
Photinia parvifolia var. chingshuiensis is a plant species in the family Rosaceae, also known as a type of Chinese photinia. 
It has been found to possess antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its medicinal value. 
The plant is believed to have health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure and cholesterol levels, as well as exhibiting antioxidant properties that can help protect against cell damage. 
Herbal preparations of Photinia parvifolia var. chingshuiensis are often used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various conditions, including fever, cough, and digestive issues.
